core_concept: The Rap Beef Simulator is designed as a gritty, high-contrast 'Control Room' for hip-hop clashes. It uses brutalist typography, stark borders, and a deep obsidian palette punctuated by aggressive reds and golds. The aesthetic rejects clean SaaS looks for a raw, concrete-textured, high-tension atmosphere.

rules: Headings must use 'tracking-tight' and uppercase styling to feel like heavy boxing posters.
Body text uses monospace for a raw, data-driven 'terminal' feel.
Never use default Inter for headings.
Max hero text size is text-6xl.
Use tight gaps (gap-4 or gap-6) to maintain density.
Containers must have internal padding (p-6) to prevent text collision.
Apply 1px solid borders to all cards (border-border).
No soft shadows. Use sharp, aggressive styling or 1px inner glows.

surfaces_and_micro_themes.dashboard_cards: Grid Borders/Retro-Futurism: Flat #121212 background, sharp 1px border (#262626). On hover, border color changes to #FF3B30.
surfaces_and_micro_themes.war_zone_active: When War Zone is ON, inject subtle red scanlines or a red drop-shadow on the main container.

components.search_inputs: Shadcn Input. Strip rounded corners (rounded-none). Heavy border on focus (focus:border-primary).
components.prime_slider: Shadcn Slider. Custom track color: Gold (#FFD700). Thumb must be sharp and distinct.
components.war_zone_toggle: Shadcn Switch. Custom active state: Blood Red (#FF3B30) with drop-shadow-[0_0_8px_rgba(255,59,48,0.8)].
components.timeline: Vertical layout, left-aligned. Staggered Framer Motion entrance. Use 1px left border (border-border) with nodes.
components.damage_report: Bento grid layout. High contrast text. Use red for damage taken, gold/green for career boosts.
components.scales_of_justice: Lucide-React 'Scale' icon, placed in Top Left, stroke-width 1.5, text-primary.

motion.hover_states: Hard transitions, no soft fades. Instant border color changes.
motion.timeline_events: Spring animation with high stiffness to feel aggressive.

testing.rules: All interactive elements MUST include data-testid attributes (e.g., data-testid='rapper-1-search').

image_urls.description: Dark concrete texture to be used at 10-20% opacity over the #050505 background for a gritty, tactile feel.
Red smoke to be used dynamically (opacity fade-in) in the background when 'War Zone' is toggled ON.

instructions_to_main_agent: Initialize React with Tailwind CSS and Shadcn UI.
Install 'Anton' and 'JetBrains Mono' from Google Fonts in index.html or global css.
Build the dashboard layout with two distinct sides for the rappers and a central column for the battle timeline.
Implement the 'War Zone' toggle to trigger the red smoke background effect.
Use mock AI logic to simulate the rounds, tiers, and damage report (highlighting it's MOCKED in UI/comments).
Ensure all buttons, inputs, and sliders have appropriate data-testid attributes.
Enforce the dark theme strictly—no light mode toggle.
